overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character riding a horse at night through a forested wilderness trail, following a walking companion who carries a lantern. The pair traverse rocky terrain and cross a wooden bridge over a creek, with the horse briefly rearing up before continuing along the path.

events.description: horse rears up suddenly on the path, halting briefly

agents.ego_description: riding a horse following a walking man who carries a lantern illuminating the path

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the trail carrying a lantern

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail scattered with white rocks and boulders
dense pine trees silhouetted against the dark sky
dense pine trees on the hillside
large white rocks lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the camera following a horse and rider moving along a rocky dirt path. A walking man ahead carries a lantern that illuminates the immediate path. Dense pine forests flank both sides of the trail. At approximately 7.5 seconds, the horse suddenly rears up before continuing forward.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail toward a wooden bridge visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking steadily toward the wooden bridge ahead

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge spanning a creek in the distance

segments.scene_description: Following the brief halt, the horse and rider continue along the rocky trail as the wooden bridge ahead becomes increasingly visible. The walking companion maintains his pace ahead, lantern swinging as he approaches the bridge structure.

events.description: horse steps onto wooden bridge crossing a rocky creek bed
exits wooden bridge back onto dirt trail

agents.ego_description: carefully riding the horse across the wooden planks of the bridge

notable_agents.action: walking across the wooden bridge ahead of the horse

entered.detail: rocky creek bed visible below the wooden bridge
steep rocky slope alongside the creek

segments.scene_description: The horse and rider transition onto a wooden bridge spanning a rocky creek bed. The lantern light reflects off the wooden planks as they cross. The creek bed is visible below to the left, with rocky embankments on either side. After crossing, they exit back onto the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with grassy verges

agents.ego_description: riding along a wider dirt trail surrounded by grass and scattered trees

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the trail through the grassy area

entered.detail: open grassy meadow area alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the trail opens into a wider path bordered by grassy clearings. The terrain becomes less rocky and more grass-covered. The pair continue through the forest with pine trees visible in the background as the path stretches ahead into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that transitions from a rugged, rocky path into a more open, grassy woodland. It begins by following a horse and rider through dense pine forests, guided by the swinging lantern of a walking companion who illuminates the rocky dirt. As the horse briefly rears up before regaining its stride, the camera pushes forward toward a wooden bridge that emerges from the darkness. The scene then shifts as the party crosses the bridge over a rocky creek bed, with the lantern light reflecting off the wooden planks before they exit back onto the trail. Finally, the terrain opens up into wider, grass-covered clearings, leaving the rocky embankments behind as the path stretches further into the nocturnal forest.
